features: Compatibility: Shockproof case for iPad Mini 5th/4th Generation 7.9 inch 2019/2015 released, Model (A2133 / A2124 / A2125 / A2126 / A1538 / A1550). NOT compatible with iPad Air/Pro Series or any other models

3-in-1 Protective Case with Screen Protector: This case for iPad Mini 7.9 inch is designed with anti-shock material, with hard PC frame, soft silicone skin and anti-scratch screen protector, to create the full-body protection case for your iPad Mini 5th/4th Generation. Not only shockproof/long-lasting but also comfortable holding feel

360° Rotating Stand & Adjustable Hand Strap: The rotatable stand can provide multi-angle support, allowing you to flexibly choose a more comfortable viewing/typing/drawing angle. With soft hand strap, you can hold your tablet securely with one hand and use it at any angle, convenient for meetings or traveling

Multifunctional Carrying Strap: The shoulder strap for iPad Mini 5/ Mini 4 case is adjustable and detachable, convenient for both kids and adults to carry the Mini 7.9'' case during hiking, traveling or other outdoor activities. And you can also hang it anywhere to free your hands for better enjoyment

Precise Cutouts & Pencil Holder: Easy access to all buttons, controls and ports without having to remove the case for iPad Mini 5th/4th Generation. Built-in pencil holder helps keep your stylus in place for handy use (Stylus is NOT included)
description: Product Description SEYMAC stock High-quality protection is what we are strongly committed to. We have been focusing on protection technology and design for more than 10 years. SEYMAC stock has a long history of being responsive to customers’ purchase requirements. Our cases provide the tablet/phone device with ultimate protection. Whether you're looking to outfit your smart phone or tablet, choose SEYMAC stock. We know you won't be disappointed! COMPATIBILITY：ONLY for iPad Mini 5th/4th Generation (2019/2015) 7.9 Inch. Model Number: iPad MINI 5 2019: A2133 / A2124 / A2125 / A2126 iPad MINI 4 2015: A1538 / A1550 Notice: This case doesn't come with an iPad Pen! Unique Features about iPad Mini 5th/4th Generation Case: All in One iPad Mini Case with Screen Protector 3 pieces combined installation, full-body protective rugged case for iPad Mini 5 and iPad Mini 4. Equipped with 360 rotating built-in kickstand/hand strap, portable shoulder strap, screen protector, hard PC frame & soft silicone outer shell. 360° Rotating Built-in Kickstand The sturdy built-in kickstand will help free your hands when you are watching videos or playing games. The rotatable stand allows custom Horizontal or vertical angles. Ideal choices for viewing, reading, typing and video chat. Prevention of Drop Damages Hundreds of drop resistance tests prove that it can effectively keeps iPad away from damages of dropping, bumps and shocks. Excellent safety performance prolongs the lifetime of your iPad Mini 5 or Mini 4. Adjustable/Detachable Shoulder Strap The adjustable and detachable shoulder strap (total length: 172cm 67in) makes it more convenient to carry your iPad Mini. Easy to attach and remove. With the shoulder strap, you can free your hands while working, playing games or hiking, no need to carry a backpack anymore. You can use the strap to hang the iPad on the back of the car seat or elsewhere for better enjoyment. Stylus Pencil Holder (Notice: The Pencil is not included!) The iPad Mini Case offers a stylus pencil holder to help you store iPad pencil, easy to plug in/out, make sure that your iPad pencil is always by your side when you need it. 360° Degrees Rotating Hand Strap The hand strap is made from premium soft fabric, provides you with comfortable hand feeling. The width can be adjusted according to the size of the hand, fit for childrens and adults. Convenient Shoulder Strap Better choice for outdoor activities like hiking, climbing or outdoor photography etc. The shoulder strap will help protect your iPad against from accidental drops, shocks and shocks. Also, you can hang your iPad on the back of car seat for better enjoyment, especially when you are a long journey. Kids Friendly Design The colorful iPad Mini 5th/4th Generation case is very suitable for children to use in daily life like watching movies, doing homework or online studying. If you are worried that your kids will accidentally break the iPad, this protective case is undoubtedly your best choice. Package Content 1x Shockproof Case for iPad Mini 5th/4th Generation 7.9 inch 2019/2015; 1x Cleaning Cloth; 1x Installation Tool; 1x Detachable Shoulder Strap; All-in one case with Pencil Holder, Screen Protector, Kickstand, Hand Strap and Shoulder Strap.
